name: Barbarian
proficiencies: Light armor, medium armor, shields, simple weapons, martial weapons
starting_equipment: Greataxe or any martial melee weapon
Two handaxes or any simple weapon
description: A primal warrior who channels rage and durability.

name: Bard
proficiencies: Light armor, simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords
starting_equipment: Rapier or longsword or simple weapon
description: A versatile spellcaster who turns art and words into magic.

name: Cleric
proficiencies: Light armor, medium armor, shields, simple weapons
starting_equipment: Scale mail or leather armor or chain mail
Light crossbow and 20 bolts or simple weapon
description: A divine caster empowered by faith and sacred purpose.

name: Druid
proficiencies: Light armor (nonmetal), medium armor (nonmetal), shields (nonmetal), clubs, daggers, darts, javelins, maces, quarterstaffs, scimitars, sickles, slings, spears
starting_equipment: Wooden shield or any simple weapon
Scimitar or any simple melee weapon
Leather armor, explorer's pack, druidic focus
description: A guardian of nature who commands primal spells.

name: Fighter
proficiencies: All armor, shields, simple weapons, martial weapons
starting_equipment: Chain mail or leather armor + longbow + 20 arrows
Martial weapon and shield or two martial weapons
Light crossbow + 20 bolts or two handaxes
description: A flexible weapon specialist and frontline combatant.

name: Monk
description: A disciplined martial artist with mobility and control.

name: Paladin
proficiencies: All armor, shields, simple weapons, martial weapons
starting_equipment: Martial weapon and shield or two martial weapons
Five javelins or any simple melee weapon
description: A holy warrior bound by oath and conviction.

name: Ranger
proficiencies: Light armor, medium armor, shields, simple weapons, martial weapons
starting_equipment: Two shortswords or two simple melee weapons
description: A hunter and wilderness scout with martial training.

name: Rogue
proficiencies: Light armor, simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords, thieves' tools
starting_equipment: Shortbow + quiver of 20 arrows or shortsword
Burglar's Pack or Dungeoneer's Pack or Explorer's Pack
Leather armor, two daggers, thieves' tools
description: A precise opportunist focused on skill and tactical damage.

name: Sorcerer
proficiencies: Daggers, darts, slings, quarterstaffs, light crossbows
starting_equipment: Light crossbow + 20 bolts or any simple weapon
description: An innate arcane caster fueled by bloodline or cosmic power.

name: Warlock
starting_equipment: Light crossbow + 20 bolts or simple weapon
Leather armor, simple weapon, two daggers
description: A pact-bound caster with compact, potent spellcasting.

name: Wizard
proficiencies: Daggers, darts, slings, quarterstaffs, light crossbows
description: A prepared arcane scholar who studies and records spells.
